task_completion.description: Navigate to the Work Locations configuration or creation screen.

task_completion.description: Create a new work location named 'East Side Satellite Office'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'East Side Satellite Office' entered into the Work Location Name field on the creation form.
The Location Type field or dropdown shows 'Office' selected on the work location form.

task_completion.description: Assign Marc Demo to the new work location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Marc Demo's employee profile (Work Information tab) showing 'East Side Satellite Office' as the Work Location, or Marc Demo explicitly added to the employees list for this location.

task_completion.description: Assign Audrey Peterson to the new work location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Audrey Peterson's employee profile (Work Information tab) showing 'East Side Satellite Office' as the Work Location, or Audrey Peterson explicitly added to the employees list for this location.

task_completion.description: Assign Randall Lewis to the new work location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Randall Lewis's employee profile (Work Information tab) showing 'East Side Satellite Office' as the Work Location, or Randall Lewis explicitly added to the employees list for this location.
The forms are in a saved state (e.g., absence of a 'Save' button, presence of a cloud checkmark icon, or the updated records are visible in a read-only list/kanban view).

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard web browser interaction with the Odoo UI, rather than API calls or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface is visible in a browser window, not simulated in a text editor or mock environment.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing database insertion commands (e.g., psql) or python scripts modifying Odoo records directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a new work location named exactly 'East Side Satellite Office' with a location type of 'office'. Three specific employees must be assigned to this location: 'Marc Demo', 'Audrey Peterson', and 'Randall Lewis'.
